column7: segment method: 国产智能计算(Kunpeng+Ascend hardware) segment revenue / total revenue. FY2024 actual 50.4% [S151]; H1 2025 actual 21.7% [S151], reconciles to CNY 284M on CNY 1306.4M H1 revenue [S147]; FY2025 full-year point figure NOT independently fetched (full annual report PDF unreadable this session - see V file); range = low case H2 stays near H1 rate -> 21.7% FY25, high case H2 reverts to FY24 rate -> 38.6% FY25

column7: NOT-ESTIMABLE: FY2025 top-5 customers are anonymized (48.49% combined; individual 15.16/11.83/9.67/8.15/3.68%), no source names Huawei among them [S160]; the one direct company reply to 'is Accelink a core Ascend-ecosystem optical supplier, is 800G Ascend-certified' (2025-05-16) was a non-answer, not a confirmation [S162]; FY2025 summary/Q1 2026 report contain no 华为/昇腾 in accessible text (multiple mirrors, all NOT FOUND); the ~71%-of-revenue data&access segment [S169] serves a diversified multi-customer base per secondary color, not Huawei/Ascend-specific, so a segment-ceiling method would misattribute; only specific Huawei/Ascend % claims (25-40% of revenue) trace to one anonymous deleted-account tier-4 forum post [S172], barred from being load-bearing per SOURCE_STANDARDS

column7: Huawei/Ascend-specific = NOT-ESTIMABLE: no source decomposes NAURA revenue by end-customer or end-chip-use, and company itself declined to quantify even the broader "advanced-process" (先进制程) revenue share when asked directly [S178 Q40: "先进制程设备占比持续增加", no % given]. Exposed-base proxy (NOT Huawei-specific) = 电子工艺装备 (IC/semiconductor-process + vacuum/new-energy equipment) segment revenue / total FY2025 revenue = CNY 36.731bn / CNY 39.353bn = 93.34% [S180;S181, both Sina-Finance-family with byte-identical figures -- treated as one publisher, not independently cross-confirmed; total revenue is tier-1 exact per S175]. Customer concentration (all unnamed): top-5 = 39.0% of FY2025 revenue [S179 10jqka=39.02%; S181 Sina=39.03%, two structurally distinct methodologies, genuinely cross-confirmed].
column8: 2026-2027年国内半导体设备整体资本开支仍会维持高位...核心驱动主要来自两大主线：一是下游新兴应用需求爆发，AI算力芯片、HBM及先进存储等领域产能扩建需求旺盛；二是国产化替代加速推进...从细分领域增速来看，存储、先进逻辑和先进封装均保持快速增长（北方华创投资者关系活动记录表编号2026-001，2026年5月15日，S177）

column7: No fetched tier<=3 source names Shennan's current (FY2023-2025) top-5 customers/suppliers -- company anonymizes as 第一名/第二名 per its own 2025-03-16 reply citing commercial confidentiality + the <50%-single-customer disclosure threshold [S193]; FY2025 concentration (as of 2025-12-31): top-5=18.42% (CNY 43.56亿/236.47亿), #1=7.46% (CNY 17.65亿) [S191] is the arithmetic CEILING for any single customer's FY2025 revenue share, Huawei included IF present -- but no source identifies who #1-5 actually are; for comparison, 2014-2017 IPO-era prospectus named Huawei at 16.50-29.09% when top-5 concentration ran 40.46-47.35% [S203, snippet-only, historic, non-load-bearing]; AI-server-specific PCB revenue share was self-described as low in 2023 [S194], no % update found through Q1 2026 despite the company being asked directly in 2026 [S192]; all specific Huawei/Ascend attribution located is tier-4 self-media/forum, confirmed uncited on inspection [S201]; net NOT-ESTIMABLE for a Huawei/Ascend-specific FY2025 % with any defensible arithmetic
column8: 2025年第三季度，受益于AI服务器及相关配套产品的需求增长，公司数据中心领域订单同比增长（董秘互动易回复镜像，2026-02-02，S192；回应投资者关于「公司PCB应用于AI服务器的营收占PCB整块营收的比例大约是多少」的提问，未给出具体比例数字；同日期区间内公司对英伟达Rubin/AMD等具体客户关系问题一律以"基于商业保密原则...不便于回复"婉拒，S192）

column7: Ceiling method: Ascend-linked revenue must sit within 境内(domestic) revenue since Ascend AI chips are a China-only product under export controls; no evidence found that Huawei/Ascend sales are booked as 境外(overseas) revenue. FY2025 domestic revenue = 9.42% of total (CNY 36.03亿/382.40亿) [S205, fetched]; FY2024 = 13.19% [S207, fetched] — this is a CEILING, not an Ascend-specific figure. Domestic share FELL YoY (13.19%->9.42%), opposite of a contradicted tier-4 claim of 35% by 2025 [S214]. No company filing or tier<=3 source decomposes Huawei/Ascend share within the domestic segment; the only circulating number ("Huawei orders=15% of revenue", S154, tier 4) exceeds the entire domestic ceiling and is arithmetically impossible. Company's own 互动易 replies [S209,S210] state domestic demand concentrates in 400G/800G while top-tier 1.6T/800G demand is "primarily overseas", implying Ascend-linked share is a minority of the 9.42% ceiling, not its entirety. Bounded 0%-9.42% of FY2025 revenue; not further resolvable this session.
column8: 1.6T和800G目前主要以海外市场需求为主，国内市场目前对光模块的需求集中在400G和800G（公司互动易回复，2025-02-23，经163.com转引，S209）

column7: No fetched source maps any of Shenling's anonymized FY2023-2025 top-5 customer ranks [S221] to a name; FY2025 (as of 2025-12-31): top-5 combined=36.72% (CNY 15.45亿/42.09亿), #1 rank=14.30% (~CNY 6.02亿, this audit's arithmetic) is the CEILING for any single unnamed customer -- historic prospectus-era disclosure named Huawei explicitly at 20.94%/23.62%/36.15% of revenue for 2017/2018/2019 [S225, tier-3 report of prospectus, not independently fetched], higher than any current single-rank or even current top-5-combined share, consistent with diversification since 2020 IPO; CURRENT (FY2025) annual report + AIGC cross-check independently name "H公司" (not the literal characters 华为) as a top customer alongside ByteDance/Tencent/COLO operators [S220,S223] -- inferred to mean Huawei given historic context but NOT confirmed by any fetched source using the word 华为 in the company's own voice; data-services segment (houses any liquid-cooling business) = 55.66% of FY2025 revenue (23.43亿/42.09亿, this audit's arithmetic) [S223] is the outer bound for ANY AI-data-center-adjacent business, not Huawei- or liquid-cooling-specific within it; three compounding unknowns (which rank is H公司; what fraction of it is liquid-cooling vs traditional air conditioning; what fraction of that is Ascend/AI-specific vs Huawei's other liquid-cooling uses e.g. EV charging piles per S228) are each undisclosed; net NOT-ESTIMABLE for a Huawei/Ascend-specific FY2025 % with any defensible arithmetic
column8: 2025-09-01互动易回复（10jqka镜像，S222）：投资者问"在华为的数据中心液冷解决方案中，公司是主力供应商还是有多家共享份额？公司如何评估与华为在液冷领域合作的'排他性'或'深度绑定'优势？"，公司答："您好！公司与主要客户之间的合作都有保密协议限制，无法在互动易平台谈及具体客户合作情况。请理解。公司业务情况请参见定期报告及公众号发布。谢谢！"（对英伟达液冷产品问题同日以相同话术婉拒）

column4: ISV / Ascend-Kunpeng all-in-one machines + computing hardware (via 软通计算机, ex-同方计算机)
column7: Two non-additive measures: (1) hardware ceiling = FY2025 计算产品与智能电子 segment RMB15.809bn / RMB35.090bn total = 45.05%, but this segment bundles a separate non-Huawei X86 consumer-PC/ODM business (智通国际/机械革命) with no FY2025 sub-split disclosed; rough extrapolation using the pre-acquisition 2022 revenue mix between 同方计算机/同方国际 (42.5%/57.5%) implies a weaker ~19% lower anchor for the Kunpeng/Ascend-specific slice (assumption-dependent, not disclosed). (2) broader historical Huawei-counterparty-revenue (all business lines, company-named in IPO prospectus) was 53-55% (2018-2020) declining to an unconfirmed-identity 25.42% largest-customer figure in FY2025 (company stopped naming customers post-IPO) - NOT equated with Huawei per A8. Clean Ascend/Kunpeng-only point figure is NOT-ESTIMABLE from disclosed data.
column8: 作为鲲鹏、昇腾双优选合作伙伴，软通计算机推出端侧AI推理液冷工作站、高性能智算服务器等产品

column7: FY2025 top-1 customer (anonymized "客户一" in own filing) = 60.52% of CNY 2,527,729,770.66 revenue = ~CNY1.53bn [S266 filing text; S268 F10 percentages match]; identity as Huawei not named in filing but corroborated by company's own 2023-10-09 earnings-briefing statement naming Huawei as largest customer at >60% of communications-segment revenue, plus 3 independently-dated 2026 tier-3 reports [S275;S276;S278] citing the same CNY1.53bn/60.52% FY2025 figure (exact arithmetic match to the anonymized filing %); H1'25 separately reported at 64.29% [S275]; this is an ALL-HUAWEI ceiling (legacy telecom + any AI-server business combined) -- no fetched source splits Huawei revenue by Ascend/AI-server vs legacy-telecom end-use, so Ascend-specific % is NOT-ESTIMABLE; historic ceiling for context: Huawei = >95% of the high-speed-connector PRODUCT LINE specifically during 2019-2021 IPO-reporting period [S273], but that is a different (legacy sub-56Gbps generation, pre-AI-buildout) product tier and cannot be carried forward as a current/Ascend-specific figure
column8: 公司是华为高速背板连接器核心供应商之一 ("The company is one of the core suppliers of Huawei's high-speed backplane connectors" -- official 上证e互动/互动易 reply, independently dated 2024-03-21 [S269] and repeated verbatim in the current 2026-era reply set [S267]; company's own reply separately scopes this product to "数据中心用高端服务器、交换机" [data-center high-end servers/switches] -- but no company reply located this session uses the literal characters 昇腾 or 超节点; supply link = Tier A generically, Tier B for the Ascend-brand-specific overlay; the watchlist's "dominant share" claim specifically remains UNVERIFIED -- see V_688629.md Tier section)

Outer-context only (NOT Huawei-specific): China-region revenue share = 85.6% FY2025 [S291] rising to 88.9% Q1 2026 [S290]. No named-analyst Huawei/Ascend-specific % estimate found despite search.
column8: SMIC's own 上证e互动 reply (2022-01-06): "该公司原则上不在e互动上做回应" (declines to confirm/deny Huawei-linked rumors on principle). Tier-3 substantiation: TrendForce 2026-04-07: "Ascend 950 PR is manufactured by SMIC using its N+3 process...comparable to a 5nm-class process"; "the core compute backbone is the Ascend 910C, manufactured using SMIC's 7nm process." SMIC's own FY2025/Q1-2026 disclosures never mention Huawei/Ascend/昇腾.
